name: FlexibleDataFormatValidation
label: Flexible data format validation
description: Validates a standalone Excel/CSV table or a ZIP containing multiple Excel, CSV, TSV or delimited TXT files against a JSON configuration. Produces human-readable and machine-readable validation reports plus a ZIP containing the inspected data files.

parameters.name: stopOnErrors
parameters.label: Stop workflow on critical errors
parameters.description: When TRUE, the wrapper exits with code 1 when any critical validation error is found. When FALSE, reports are generated and the workflow continues.

parameters.name: inputMode
parameters.label: Input mode
parameters.description: AUTO detects whether the data input is a ZIP archive or a standalone table. ARCHIVE requires a ZIP. SINGLE_FILE requires one standalone Excel/CSV/TSV/TXT file.

parameters.name: unmatchedFiles
parameters.label: Unmatched file policy
parameters.description: Action when a supported file cannot be associated with any configured table type.

parameters.name: outputPrefix
parameters.label: Output filename prefix
parameters.description: Prefix added to every inspected filename inside the output ZIP.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Data file or data ZIP
inputs.description: Either one standalone Excel/CSV/TSV/TXT file or a ZIP containing any number and mixture of those formats. Use ZIP when several files must be supplied.

inputs.name: input-config
inputs.label: Validation configuration
inputs.description: JSON configuration defining filename patterns, reader settings, columns, data types, required values, ranges, allowed values and regular expressions.

outputs.name: output-log
outputs.label: Validation log
outputs.description: Human-readable report listing critical errors, warnings, reader settings and rule assignment for every inspected file.

outputs.name: output-report
outputs.label: Validation report JSON
outputs.description: Machine-readable validation summary and per-file results.

outputs.name: output-data
outputs.label: Inspected data ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP containing the supplied table files with the configured output prefix. The files are not modified; validation status is reported separately.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
